The surviving driver's statement is pending.

Recovered from an injury-plagued first Test, Henry's resurgence showcased his prowess as New Zealand's leading pace bowler.

Authorities are negotiating for their descent while investigating the initial clash.

Former CEO Graham Walker wrote a single clause into the deal: 15% of proceeds for the staff, none of whom held any equity. The average bonus works out to around $443,000 per worker.

7 dead, over 40 hospitalised after ammonia leak at Tamil Nadu seafood factory
description: A devastating ammonia gas leak at a seafood export unit in Tamil Nadu's Tiruvallur district has claimed seven lives and left over 40 guest workers hospitalized. The toxic gas spread rapidly through the factory premises, causing severe respiratory distress and other critical symptoms. Emergency services and an NDRF team were deployed to the scene.

Anthropic co-founder who said software engineering is 'dead', now says days of AI prompts are over
description: AI pioneer Boris Cherny, co-founder of Anthropic, is shifting his focus from manual prompt writing to 'loop engineering.' This new approach involves AI agents autonomously generating and refining prompts, moving beyond constant human input.  Other AI leaders like Peter Steinberger and Addy Osmani echo this sentiment, emphasizing the design of these AI 'loops' over direct prompting. This evolution positions AI agents as more akin to employees, managing tasks and workflows.

Brazil fan tries Rocky Balboa ‘curse’ to derail Lionel Messi’s World Cup dream
description: A Brazil fan sparked online buzz after placing Lionel Messi's Argentina jersey on Philadelphia's Rocky Balboa statue, a tradition believed by some rival supporters to jinx opponents. The stunt came as Argentina prepares to face Austria after Messi's historic hat trick against Algeria. Meanwhile, Brazil climbed to the top of Group C with a 3-0 win over Haiti and will next face Scotland in the FIFA World Cup.

title: Taylor Swift and Blake Lively’s friendship faces strain ahead of wedding
description: Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce have maintained privacy even though they are pretty public about their high profile relationship for the last three years. While both of them have remained publicly distant from Blake Lively, it seems Taylor Swift’s friendship with her had taken a dramatic turn, just a few weeks ago as the pop star now gears up to finally get married.

title: People who thank others excessively may be surprised by support without strings attached
description: Over-thanking for small favors reveals a nuanced experience of connection and care, psychology suggests. It's not just politeness; it signals feeling truly seen and valued. This response can also stem from unease about owing a debt or social pressure to appear grateful. Such reactions highlight the significance of unconditional kindness, reflecting a deep appreciation for genuine human connection.

title: Death trap in the deep: The silent sinkhole of Bengaluru’s sewage plant
description: Two workers vanished inside a Bengaluru sewage plant, sparking outrage from activists who claim they were illegally hired for hazardous work without safety. The water authority denies manual scavenging, stating the men entered unauthorizedly while attempting gate repairs. The incident highlights ongoing concerns about worker safety and accountability in the city's sanitation sector, with calls for prosecution of responsible officials.

title: Happy Father’s Day 2026: Top 50 wishes, messages and quotes to make dad feel special
description: Fathers often express love through actions, not words, and Father's Day on June 21, 2026, is a time to appreciate their guidance and support. Simple gestures like cooking a favorite meal or sharing memories can mean more than gifts. This day is about acknowledging their sacrifices and letting them know they are deeply appreciated.
